name: Blade Dancer
text:
When you choose a friendly unit, you may exhaust me and pay :rb_rune_rainbow: to ready it.
When you conquer, you may pay :rb_energy_1: to ready me.

accessibility_text:
Riftbound Legend: Blade Dancer. When you choose a friendly unit, you may exhaust me and pay [A] to ready it.
When you conquer, you may pay [1] to ready me.
